title: Warm congratulations to Shanghai Moming Yulai Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Tianhui Group Company, for winning the 2019 "Special Cooperation Award" and winning the sales championship for three consecutive years!
contentHtml:
November 29, 2019

Zeng Shengwen, Chairman of Tianhui Group, was invited to participate in Yanchang Petrochemical Sales (Shanghai) 2019 Polyolefin Customer Symposium

Under the group companyShanghai Inexplicable Rain Co., Ltd.Won the 2019 "Special Cooperation Award"

Reelected for three consecutive yearsSales champion!

This symposium will report and summarize the sales performance in 2019, and propose preliminary plans for general products in 2020. As a strategic partner of Yanchang Petroleum, Tianhui Group is deeply grateful to our customers for their long-term support! The company will uphold the guiding ideology of "integrity, mutual benefit, and common development"
Continue to forge ahead, be pragmatic and innovative, strengthen practical cooperation and take practical actions to help social and economic development!
titleZh: 热烈祝贺天晖集团公司旗下上海莫名雨莱有限公司荣获2019年度《特别合作奖》 连续三年蝉联销售冠军！
contentHtmlZh:
2019年11月29日

天晖集团董事长曾胜文受邀参加延长石油化工销售（上海）2019年聚烯烃客户座谈会

集团公司旗下上海莫名雨莱有限公司荣获2019年度《特别合作奖》

连续三年蝉联销售冠军！

本次座谈会针对2019年销售业绩进行汇报总结，并对2020年通用产品提出初步计划作为延长石油的战略合作伙伴，天晖集团对广大客户的长期支持深表感谢!公司会秉持“诚信、互利、共同发展”的指导思想
不断开拓进取、务实创新，强化务实合作以实际行动助力社会经济发展！
